title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Ishtar Hymn
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Ishtar Hymn.

translation.text: From 'Ishtar Hymn': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
